eye-level.label: Eye level
eye-level.modifier: eye level camera, neutral horizontal perspective

high.label: High angle
high.modifier: high angle shot, camera positioned above looking down at subject

low.label: Low angle
low.modifier: low angle shot, camera below eye level looking up at subject, imposing perspective

overhead.label: Overhead / Top-down
overhead.modifier: overhead top-down shot, camera directly above, 90 degree downward view

ground.label: Ground level
ground.modifier: ground level camera, extremely low angle looking steeply upward, floor-level perspective

dutch.label: Dutch tilt
dutch.modifier: Dutch tilt, canted camera angle, diagonal frame, tension and unease

ots.label: Over-the-shoulder
ots.modifier: over-the-shoulder framing, camera behind figure, partial shoulder in foreground

profile.label: Profile view
profile.modifier: profile shot, side view, camera at 90 degrees to subject

three-quarter.label: Three-quarter
three-quarter.modifier: three-quarter angle, face 45 degrees toward camera, classic portrait framing

tighter.label: Tighter (zoom in)
tighter.modifier: tighter framing, closer crop on subject, reduced background area

wider.label: Wider (zoom out)
wider.modifier: wider framing, more environment visible, pulled back from subject

ecu.label: Extreme close-up
ecu.modifier: extreme close-up, face fills entire frame, maximum intimacy, forehead to chin

cu.label: Close-up
cu.modifier: close-up shot, head and upper shoulders, intimate portrait framing

mcu.label: Medium close-up
mcu.modifier: medium close-up, chest to head framing, shoulders visible, standard dialogue shot

medium.label: Medium shot
medium.modifier: medium shot, waist up framing, standard conversational distance

cowboy.label: Cowboy shot
cowboy.modifier: cowboy shot, mid-thigh upward framing, classic western composition

full-body.label: Full body
full-body.modifier: full body shot, entire figure visible head to toe, full length framing

wide.label: Wide shot
wide.modifier: wide establishing shot, subjects within large environment, location context prominent

neutral.label: Neutral

smile.label: Natural smile
smile.modifier: warm natural smile, genuine happiness, eyes slightly crinkled

laugh.label: Laughing
laugh.modifier: open-mouth laugh, teeth visible, eyes squinting with joy

serious.label: Serious
